title: Bass Finger Sandwich
description: A refreshing seafood finger sandwich. Perfect for a light lunch or snack.
instructions: 1. In a shallow dish, mix together the brine, salt, and any additional desired flavorings.
2. Place the bass fillets in the brine and marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
4. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
5. Remove the bass from the brine and pat it dry with paper towels.
6. Dredge the bass in the dry mixture to coat.
7. Place the bass on the prepared baking sheet and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
8. Meanwhile, toast the finger sandwiches until lightly browned.
9. Assemble the sandwiches by placing a piece of bass on each toasted bun.
10. Garnish with additional dry mixture, if desired.
